creator: wolfgang@lyxys.ka.sub.org
text:
Hi,
running in lldb gives me:
--------------------------
# lldb -o r -- php -r 'proc_open(["date"], [], $pipes);'
(lldb) target create "php"
Current executable set to 'php' (x86_64).
(lldb) settings set -- target.run-args  "-r" "proc_open([\"date\"], [], $pipes);"
(lldb) r
Wed May 29 15:13:58 CEST 2024
Process 35995 stopped
* thread #1, name = 'php', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV: invalid address (fault address: 0x888e9c408)
    frame #0: 0x00000000005c5e21 php`zend_function_dtor + 49
php`zend_function_dtor:
->  0x5c5e21 <+49>: testb  $0x40, 0x4(%rdi)
    0x5c5e25 <+53>: jne    0x5c5e30                  ; <+64>
    0x5c5e27 <+55>: addl   $-0x1, (%rdi)
    0x5c5e2a <+58>: je     0x5c5ec4                  ; <+212>
Process 35995 launched: '/usr/local/bin/php' (x86_64)
(lldb) bt
* thread #1, name = 'php', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV: invalid address (fault address: 0x888e9c408)
  * frame #0: 0x00000000005c5e21 php`zend_function_dtor + 49
    frame #1: 0x00000000005ea4a7 php`zend_hash_destroy + 119
    frame #2: 0x00000000005c6a9a php`destroy_zend_class + 1146
    frame #3: 0x00000000005eb395 php`zend_hash_graceful_reverse_destroy + 517
    frame #4: 0x00000000005d2e3a php`___lldb_unnamed_symbol6918 + 58
    frame #5: 0x0000000000564b29 php`php_module_shutdown + 41
    frame #6: 0x00000000006c4516 php`___lldb_unnamed_symbol8658 + 822
    frame #7: 0x00000000003f22d0 php`_start + 256
(lldb) q
Quitting LLDB will kill one or more processes. Do you really want to proceed: [Y/n] 
--------------------------
